message:
feat(security): make capability constraints mandatory, reject null/empty [MOR/C3.4]

- Add CapabilityConstraints::is_empty() check
- Verification path now rejects tokens with missing or empty constraints (default-deny)
- Add constraints_cbor() to CwtClaims and CapabilityTokenBuilder for CBOR constraint injection
- Update all test token builders to include constraints
- 4 acceptance tests (null_rejected, empty_rejected, valid_passes, resource_mismatch_rejected)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
